package.name: ros_image_pan_zoom_viewer_qt
package.description: A ROS1 image viewer with pan and zoom support, built with Qt5. Subscribes to a ROS image topic and displays it in a resizable Qt window. Supports mouse wheel zoom (pixel-level), arbitrary drag panning, fit-to-window / actual-size modes, crosshair overlay, screenshot saving, and depth / mono-channel pseudo-color visualization.
